docket_entries.description: AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $7,500.00 FILED BY LIM, JAMES AS TO DEFENDANT HO, CALVIN ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR AUG-09-2013 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF AUG-09-2013 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF AUG-09-2013 BY JUDGE PRO TEM GEOFFREY HOWARD. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS PRESENT. PLAINTIFFS EXHIBITS RETAINED. DEFENDANTS EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: GEOFFREY HOWARD. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF LIM, JAMES RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT HO, CALVIN $5,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $375.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,375.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
